name: codex2cc
description: Delegate bounded Codex tasks to a Claude Code compatible CLI and return structured results.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate Codex work to a Claude Code compatible CLI.
interface.longDescription: Codex2CC exposes an MCP tool that launches a configured Claude Code compatible CLI for design, coding, review, or custom tasks, streams its output, and returns structured execution results to Codex for review and orchestration.
defaultPrompt: Delegate this design task to cc.
Ask cc to implement this scoped change.
Run a cc review lane and summarize results.
